name: Chromebooks
description: Needed for students who don't have access to personal devices during chapter meetings. Each Chromebook directly enables one more student to participate.

name: USB-C Charging Hubs
description: Centralized charging solutions to keep devices powered throughout our sessions without hunting for individual outlets.

name: Printed Coding Workbooks
description: Age-appropriate coding activity books for take-home practice between chapter meetings, reinforcing concepts learned in class.
